refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall derive, record, and manage performance requirements (cycle time, energy efficiency, availability) based on worksite mission context inputs.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is decomposed to explicitly state the three key functions: derivation, recording, and management of performance requirements, ensuring clarity and traceability.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Verify by demonstrating documented performance targets traceable to worksite inputs and a maintained history of baseline and calibration updates.
sub_frs: Derive performance requirements from worksite mission context
Record derived performance requirements with traceability
Manage performance requirements including updates and history

candidate_dps: Algorithmic model to analyze mission context and derive performance targets
Database schema and storage system for recording performance requirements
Management interface and version control system for updates and history
selected_dp.selected_dp: Integrated software framework combining algorithmic derivation, database recording, and management interface

potential_sources: Tight coupling between derivation algorithm and database schema
Management interface depends on both derivation and recording modules
coupling_check.notes: The integrated framework is designed with modular interfaces to minimize coupling and allow independent updates.

assumptions_risks: Assumes availability of accurate and timely worksite mission context data
Risk of data inconsistency if updates are not properly synchronized
High safety criticality requires robust validation of derived requirements
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Ensure modular design with clear interface contracts to reduce coupling and facilitate verification.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Software framework responsible for performance requirement derivation, recording, and management

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives real-time worksite mission context data for performance derivation

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Outputs derived performance targets to operational tasking modules

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Supports data synchronization and updates with remote management systems

module_containment_scores.notes: Primary module containing all DP logic and data management; low diffusion risk.
Minimal containment; risk of diffusion if performance logic is duplicated here.
No containment; high diffusion risk if performance data is redundantly handled.
No containment; some interface for safety alerts but not related to performance derivation.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing the DP in the NGHE Solution module minimizes diffusion and supports traceability and safety requirements.
containment_risks: Potential for performance data duplication if other modules access or cache data independently
Dependency on network link reliability for synchronization
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Enforce strict interface usage and data ownership policies to prevent diffusion across modules.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The selected DP logically satisfies the refined FR sub-functions with clear traceability and verification paths.

diffusion_risks: Risk of performance logic duplication in Vehicle or Teleoperation modules if not controlled
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores favor NGHE Solution module, supporting ownership and minimizing diffusion.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed via documented performance targets and history maintained within NGHE Solution module.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of DP to NGHE Solution IM with well-defined external interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Define strict interface contracts to prevent diffusion of performance logic
Implement monitoring to detect unauthorized duplication of performance data or logic

decision.justification: While the decomposition and assignments are sound, risks related to data diffusion and coupling require refinement in interface definitions and ownership policies before proceeding.
next_level_sub_frs: Derive performance requirements from worksite mission context
Record derived performance requirements with traceability
Manage performance requirements including updates and history

revise.why: To strengthen containment and reduce diffusion risks by refining interface contracts and ownership enforcement.

assumptions: Worksite mission context data is accurate and timely
NGHE Solution module can handle all DP logic and data management
open_risks: Data duplication or diffusion across Vehicle and Teleoperation modules
evidence_needed: Verification of traceability from worksite inputs to performance targets
Validation of update and history management processes
